narrative:
Jackson 28 (precinct in Stark County) has 952 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points.
